subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the light of the Covenant! Know thou that the angels of heaven are offering prayers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه الی نور المیثاق اعلی ان ملائکة السماء یصلین
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
